headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: May 14, 2026**
article:
The Los Angeles Angels fell to the Cleveland Guardians in a 2-3 decision, with Angel Martínez leading the Angels' offense with 2 hits, including a home run. Slade Cecconi pitched 4 strong innings for the Angels, striking out 7 batters. Meanwhile, the New York Yankees secured a 6-2 victory over the Baltimore Orioles, with Will Warren earning the win after pitching 5.2 innings, striking out 6 and allowing 2 earned runs. Trent Grisham led the Yankees' offense with a home run, 3 RBIs, and a 1-for-3 batting line.

Several key players have been impacted by injuries, including Brooks Kriske (Athletics) who has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to right shoulder impingement. Other notable injuries include Robby Snelling (Miami Marlins) with a left elbow UCL sprain, Francisco Alvarez (New York Mets) with a right meniscus tear, and Drew Pomeranz (Los Angeles Angels) with left elbow inflammation.

The MLB has seen several trades and roster movements, including the Los Angeles Dodgers trading OF Jose Requena to the Arizona Diamondbacks for CF Alek Thomas. The Cleveland Guardians also acquired C Patrick Bailey from the San Francisco Giants in exchange for LHP Matt Wilkinson and other considerations. Additionally, the Baltimore Orioles acquired RHP Enyel Garcia and RHP Maicol Lauriano from the Philadelphia Phillies for cash.

top_news.title: **Angels Fall Short in Cleveland**
top_news.summary: The Los Angeles Angels dropped a 2-3 decision to the Cleveland Guardians in their latest matchup. Angel Martínez led the Angels' offense with 2 hits, including a home run, while Slade Cecconi pitched 4 strong innings for the Angels, striking out 7 batters.

top_news.title: **Yankees Take Down Orioles 6-2**
top_news.summary: The New York Yankees secured a 6-2 victory over the Baltimore Orioles, with Will Warren earning the win after pitching 5.2 innings, striking out 6 and allowing 2 earned runs. Trent Grisham led the Yankees' offense with a home run, 3 RBIs, and a 1-for-3 batting line.

top_news.title: **Nationals Take Down Reds 10-4**
top_news.summary: The Washington Nationals secured a decisive 10-4 victory over the Cincinnati Reds, with Daylen Lile leading the charge at the plate. Lile's impressive performance included three hits, two home runs, and four RBIs.

top_news.title: **Rockies Fall to Pirates in 1-3 Showdown**
top_news.summary: The Colorado Rockies suffered a 1-3 loss to the Pittsburgh Pirates, with Paul Skenes leading the Pirates' pitching effort. Skenes pitched 8.0 innings, striking out 10 batters and allowing 0 earned runs.

top_news.title: **Yankees Suffer Shutout Loss to Orioles**
top_news.summary: The New York Yankees fell to the Baltimore Orioles 7-0 in their latest matchup. Impact players for the Orioles included Adley Rutschman and Dylan Beavers, while Kyle Bradish led the pitching effort.

top_news.title: **Guardians Take Down Angels in 2-4 Showdown**
top_news.summary: The Cleveland Guardians secured a 2-4 victory over the Los Angeles Angels, with Zach Neto and Angel Martínez leading the Angels' offense. Reid Detmers and Parker Messick were notable on the mound for the Angels.

top_news.title: **Athletics RHP Brooks Kriske Placed on 15-Day IL**
top_news.summary: Athletics right-handed pitcher Brooks Kriske has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to a right shoulder impingement. The injury occurred on May 13, 2026.

top_news.title: **Diamondbacks Acquire Requena in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Arizona Diamondbacks have made a move, acquiring outfielder Jose Requena in a trade. Requena joins the Diamondbacks after being dealt from the Los Angeles Dodgers.
